name: Currents API
description: Latest news REST API aggregating real-time global news from 120,000+ sources worldwide with search, language filtering, category filtering, topic-based queries, and regional coverage across 70+ countries in 20+ languages.

potentialAction.name: Search News
potentialAction.description: Search news articles by keyword, language, category, country, and date range

potentialAction.name: Get Latest News
potentialAction.description: Retrieve the most recent news articles, optionally filtered by language
